titleStmt.title: SII 23.143: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 143. (A.R. No. 143 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Rock-cut cave—At the same entrance, left side Rājādhirāja I: year 27: 1044-45 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with introduction Tiṅgaḷērtaru etc. The king is also known from several inscriptions as Vijaya-Rājēndradēva and claims to have destroyed the city of Kalyāṇapura and performed the anointment of heroes under that name. An image of a dvārapālaka found set up in the Airāvatēśvara temple at Dārāsuram (Tanjore district) bears an inscription to the effect that it was brought by Vijayarājēndra after the conquest of Kalyāṇapuram (An. Rept. 1908, Part II, para 56).

The present record registers a gift of 25 cows for burning a perpetual lamp with ghee in the temple of Mahādēva at Pūvālaikkuḍi in Kūḍalūr-nāḍu a division of Kāna-nāḍu in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu, by a resident of the place by name Iḷamagaṉ Attāṇi Nāvaṟkuḍaiyāṉ alias Jayaṅkoṇḍaśōḻap-pēraiyaṉ for the merit of his younger sister Ariyanaṅgai. The donor seems to have been a member of a merchant guild known as Diśai-Āyirattu-Nāṉādēśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷḷer taru
taṉ toṅkal veṇkuṭai niḻalkiḻ
nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkolo
cci karuṅkali kaṭintu maṇṇupala maiyil teṉ
ṉavar muvaru māṉāparaṇaṉai Āṉāp parumaṇi cūḷpacun
talai porkaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvit tacaivil cuntarapā
ṇṭiyaṉ ticaikeṭat tollaiy mullaiyūrt turatti ve
ṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki Irāmakuṭamuvar keṭa muṉintu ve
lkeḻu kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttu Āhomallaṉum Añcol te
mavanum tāṅkarum paṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuṅ keṇṭappaya
num kaṅkātaranum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiya taṇmataviri taru vikkiya
num vicaiyātittaṉum tāmaṇi tāṅka Iruvarum Ottuṭa poṉ noṭai
yaṅkarippuriyil taṉṉāṭaiyil ceyaṅkoṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷip
pākkam Uḷḷeri maṭuntu villavaṉ miṉavaṉ veḻkulac caḷu
kkiyaṉ pallavar mutaliṉar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
ṉ neṉṉum Uypperum pukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār rājarāja
rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu keraḷāntaka nāṭṭu k kāna
nāṭṭuk kūṭalūrnāṭṭu pūvālaikkuṭi māhādevaṟku Iv
vūr Iḷamakaṉ Attaāṇi nāvaṟkuṭaiyāṉāṉa [ja]yaṅko
ṇṭacoḻapperaiyaṉṉeṉ Eṉ taṅkai Ariya
naṅkaiyyai cārtti vaiytta tiru
nontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Oṉṟiṉukku ney Uḻakku
Inneykkup pacu Irupattañcu Innāṭṭu putukkuṭaiyaāṉ kā
ṭaṉ kāṭaṉeṉ Upayaṅkoṇṭu cantirātitta
�ka Aṭṭuvatāṉeṉ
ṟṟaṅ koṉeṉ
toṇūṟṟuvanāna
kāṭaṉ kāṭaṉāṉa paḻaya
Ippacuvum Ivviḷakkum tikaiyāyirat
tu nāṉāteci Aṭaikkalam Itdharmmam
kākkumavar pādattil poṭi Eṉ ta
laimelatu Itu paṉmāyeśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 23.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
